## Turn drum audio into a score you can actually edit

## Turn drum audio into a score you can actually edit

Visit website

Drop in a full mix or an isolated drum stem. Backbeat Forge puts the performance on a five-line drum score you can check against playback and correct by hand. When the chart feels right, export it as a printable PDF or General MIDI file. It all runs locally.

results.title: Drum2Notes - Turn Drums Music into Notes | klang.io
results.content:
## Drums are not your Thing? No Problem!

### Check out our other transcription apps:

### Piano2Notes

Turn Pianos into Notes.

### Guitar2Tabs

Turn Acoustic, Electirc and Bass Guitars into Notes.

### Sing2Notes

Turn Singing into Notes.

### Melody Scanner

Transform any Song into Piano Arrangements.

## Known from



How does Drum2Notes work?

Drum2Notes can turn the drums of any song into notes, within seconds! Simply upload an audio file, paste in a YouTube link or record your instrument directly. Our AI then listens to the drums and transcribes them automatically into notes, which are displayed as sheet music. You can then edit your transcription and download it in different formats.

What kind of music can Drum2Notes transcribe? [...] Find out more in this article.

Is Drum2Notes for free?

You can do as many Demo Transcriptions with Drum2Notes as you like, which are completely for free! This allows you to test the quality before upgrading to full transcriptions, which also unlock many more features!

Find out more in this article.

How precise does Drum2Notes transcribe music?

The better the quality of the music, the better the transcription – it’s as simple as that! In other words, if a professional transcriber will have a hard time to transcribe a certain part, then so will Drum2Notes. But even if there are some mistakes in your transcribed notes, you’ve saved tons of time with Drum2Notes and the Edit Mode lets you fix these mistakes with a couple clicks.

Find out more in this article.

## Get in touch with us! [...] Skip to content

results.title: Need advice: converting a single audio drum track to MIDI
results.content:
## Content [...] - Don’t replace. Augment.
- Superior Drummer 3 converts drum audio to MIDI files exceptionally well. It’ll also play back your MIDI file with the highest quality drum samples you can find. It’s 100% worth the purchase. But if you’re looking for a cheaper option, I think steven slate trigger 2 will do audio to midi out, although I’ve never used it. I have used Drumagog for this purpose too and it works really well. Well, the DSP works really well. The UI is clunky, outdated, and it’s been abandoned by the developer. So I wouldn’t recommend it.
- Melodyne on rhythmic detection or old school it and tap it out and edit [...] and I’m still working on replying and investigating options but I wanted to express my appreciation to everyone!

results.title: ReStem + Logic Pro: Convert Any Drum Loop to MIDI with AI
results.content:
highhat hits in the audio file. If not, we can adjust the threshold slider, but looks like we're good here. We can then change the trigger note to match the closed high hat sound in drum machine designer. That's F# one. Hit okay. And then we can load a drum machine designer patch or use any drum software instrument we like. Do the same to the kick and snare. And boom, loop is converted to MIDI. So cool. [Music] Now we're free to edit this to our heart's content to make a new pattern that's completely unique for our song. [Music] Or we could take this whole thing to the next level by chopping out a sample of the audio, kick, snare, and high hat stems and then loading them into drum machine designer individually. Let me show you how to do this. So, load up a software instrument track with a [...] Whether you're a beatmaker, mixing engineer, or producer, this tool can save hours of manual editing and take your remixing and drum replacement to the next level.

More information can be found at [...] # ReStem + Logic Pro: Convert Any Drum Loop to MIDI with AI
## Chris Sangster
16600 subscribers
639 likes

### Description
30915 views
Posted: 12 Jul 2025
Learn more about ReStem (formerly ReBeat) here: 

ReStem Review: Turn Any Drum Loop into MIDI in Logic Pro 

In this video, I dive into ReStem (formerly ReBeat) by @WaveMachineLabs  — a powerful new AI-powered drum stem separator — and show how you can use it inside Logic Pro to do something producers have struggled with for years: convert a full drum loop into clean, editable MIDI.

This workflow unlocks the ability to:
-Extract individual drum elements from any loop
-Enhance a drum loop with ReStems Gate & Shaper tools
-Trigger your own drum samples or instruments
-Convert an Audio drum loop to MIDI
